key_points.our_fit_analysis: P1c — advising + 30% program/initiative coordination. JD 'What You Will Need': Bachelor's, 2+ yrs higher-ed student-services OR related advising/counseling/mentoring (K-12/non-profits OK), diverse-population experience, large-group communication/presentations, retention/student-development/proactive-advising knowledge, effective with varied audiences, MS Office. 'Would like': Life Sciences background (Jamie has Psych/Education — adjacent, NOT biology; NOT claimed), program-coordination experience (Jamie HAS — strong), SIS/CRM (DegreeWorks/Banner — Jamie does not, candid in cover). 30% coordination (newsletters, orientation, comms schedules, online-learner engagement, advising materials) maps WELL to her InGenius program-coordination + communications + remote-engagement work. Cover candid about higher-ed-office + life-sciences ramp-up. No fabrication of biology knowledge or formal advising-office tenure.
key_points.source_note: key points composed from our record fields (no full JD captured; jd_source=none).
